rationale: Acting on Review 1 yields a better PR: the single grounded placement complaint (antipode_convMul_id in TauCeti.HopfAlgebra ns inside AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints.lean, used only at the internal call site shown in the diff) is real and fixed by a trivial private; Review 2's demand to entirely relocate/split the file and its 8 public decls misreads the docstring+roadmap framing that places the functor-of-points group structure under AlgebraicGroup, producing needless churn with no placement benefit.
